total_eur: 32

project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set

    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---

function.message: OCRed all Petra Novak-related bills by adding finance-schema YAML frontmatter to the two matching purchase records and preserved each original note body. Processed the inbox request and removed the inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap rules, inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox request as non-canonical, verified Petra in canonical entity records, and applied OCR via finance frontmatter schema while preserving original bill bodies. Deleted the inbox file only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox note requested OCR for bills related to Petra Novak. Canonical identity for Petra was verified in 10_entities/cast/petra.md. Search over 50_finance found exactly two Petra-related bill records, and each visible bill note contained enough data to populate the required bill frontmatter fields defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. Both files were updated accordingly and the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
